{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320161213E1BF05644EFECEC7E955"}"},"total":266},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7365500946716295960","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢这本书，在五一假期内一口气看完了，只能说帅是一种感觉，很多情节真的很爱。看到了男主的成长史，特别喜欢他们搞事业的样子。说实话，开始带入是我都挺讨厌男主那小混混作态的，但是越到后面发现他实力越强，就感觉真的帅。很喜欢男主的小聪明，每次都能看到我心潮澎湃，真的很爱，第一次接触这种题材，而且内容也非常正能量，虽然已完结，但是我的心仍在激动。感觉他们故事没完，还在继续，我好爱。我寄希望作者再开一本写这本的后续，但我又担心，担心会变。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714916115,"group_id":"7204744835960409120","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我的作品就是番茄里的狗屎，只为彰显金子价值。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1qybMs23HWumt31ejksIKM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5dd1e12b7dff4faba9ea252202f25ad3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533884&x-signature=dPwf1%2B5IFbfCZOdWDs7pzrVO5u0%3D","user_id":"25999031416183","user_name":"奔驰旷野"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"25999031416183","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1661736263,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7204744835960409120","book_info":{"abstract":"【特种兵+军旅日常+热血+轻松+爽文】
他的哥哥是一名英勇牺牲的特种兵
还有一个他不知道，但一直关注他的司令员老爹
而他是个有名的小混混
入伍去部队的途中，因捣蛋就让接兵干部受处分
从而成为人人都不想带的刺头兵，原本以为混三年继续当小混混
但处处惹是生非的他，又每次各项第一，让人又爱又狠
新训结束无人敢要，只能到生产基地种地
但遇到一位浑身是伤的老特战队员，让他彻底觉醒
并且在哥哥遗志的激励下
他最终成为一名忠诚、英勇，令敌人闻风丧胆的特种兵！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/981476f7adc817ac2bedad60b297fa43","author":"骚客驾到","author_id":"","book_id":"7204744835960409120","book_name":"等我震惊全军，才知道亲爹是司令","book_short_name":"战鸮","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9467人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7204745504277103107","read_count":"9467","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"618543"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"255","tags":"战神赘婿,都市,特种兵","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1a37306517dce1355fd4c826196e9f76~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779178333&x-signature=k%2FWg8OUwGbaeEeHaiARWJ%2Bw5xME%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3381606054","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"617"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320161213E1BF05644EFECEC7E955"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读38小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":88240,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":138104,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":6115},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353332183473439550","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看的一本书。我也是当过兵的人，对书中描写的部队中战友情深有感触。整体上写的很好，值得一读。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712094237,"group_id":"7204744835960409120","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzChX249r8/97MSM/hMP+/0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531405&x-signature=CBwRrprj%2BL33fT06lI8aSpnKuhg%3D","user_id":"93289057695","user_name":"爱吃徽州茶的宁皓"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93289057695","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7204744835960409120","book_info":{"abstract":"【特种兵+军旅日常+热血+轻松+爽文】
他的哥哥是一名英勇牺牲的特种兵
还有一个他不知道，但一直关注他的司令员老爹
而他是个有名的小混混
入伍去部队的途中，因捣蛋就让接兵干部受处分
从而成为人人都不想带的刺头兵，原本以为混三年继续当小混混
但处处惹是生非的他，又每次各项第一，让人又爱又狠

他最终成为一名忠诚、英勇，令敌人闻风丧胆的特种兵！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/981476f7adc817ac2bedad60b297fa43","author":"骚客驾到","author_id":"","book_id":"7204744835960409120","book_name":"等我震惊全军，才知道亲爹是司令","book_short_name":"战鸮","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9467人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7204745504277103107","read_count":"9467","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"618543"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"255","tags":"战神赘婿,都市,特种兵","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1a37306517dce1355fd4c826196e9f76~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779178333&x-signature=k%2FWg8OUwGbaeEeHaiARWJ%2Bw5xME%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3381606054","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"588"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320161213E1BF05644EFECEC7E955"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读71小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":127043,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":254699,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5295},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7322816995971040050","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"嗯，还是不错的，从一个小混混变成了一个兵王，过程挺难的，等成为了一个兵王，才知道自己还有一个亲生父亲，这可能就是一个所谓的成长吧，这个让你开心，有时让你难过，但是军人他总会有牺牲和奉献，虽然难过，但是感谢你们的付出，说实话，这本小说的感情挺多的，从一个普通的社会青年到穿上军装的军人，让他感觉到我军装的意义和义务，希望我们的祖国越来越强大，希望作者大大可以写出更多的作品。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704977221,"group_id":"7204744835960409120","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"写一本小说把自己当成小说里面的人物，敞开心扉写的自由自在加油","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzRoFHlSHzQzIcVaSpQDFEY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ba660927a61249c69307786b39ebfb7b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528164&x-signature=7SzsMAosx2XdWc6e2L0SHWIjlIs%3D","user_id":"448213196214686","user_name":"星舒夜意幽凌"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"448213196214686","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1668670298,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7204744835960409120","book_info":{"abstract":"【特种兵+军旅日常+热血+轻松+爽文】
